PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: Fnancal is an educational, non-commercial portfolio tracking platform. Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what data we collect and how we handle it.
PrivacyPolicy.section1Text: We collect minimal information required to run the service. This includes: (a) Authentication Data: your email and hashed password if you choose to sign up; (b) Portfolio Data: the assets, quantities, and transaction histories you input to calculate P&L. We do not track your real financial bank accounts or balances.
PrivacyPolicy.section2Text: The information we collect is used solely to: (a) authenticating your user session; (b) calculate and display portfolio returns, charts, and asset comparisons on your dashboard. We do not sell, rent, or monetize your personal or financial data.
PrivacyPolicy.section3Text: All market prices, stock feeds, and fund returns shown on Fnancal are pulled from publicly available online sources. We do not claim ownership of these data feeds. Sourced data is processed locally to display metrics for informational and educational use.
PrivacyPolicy.section4Text: Fnancal utilizes various tools to optimize platform performance and loading speeds. No personally identifiable financial data is shared with these services.
PrivacyPolicy.section5Text: Since this is an educational project, if you have questions or wish to delete your account data, please contact the authorized person.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.intro: Welcome to Fnancal. By using this educational, non-commercial website, you agree to comply with the following terms.
TermsOfService.section1Text: Fnancal is a personal, educational portfolio tracking tool. It is offered free of charge and does not seek commercial gain or generate revenue. Sourced data (including TEFAS mutual funds) is fetched from public endpoints for informational presentation.
TermsOfService.section2Text: The content, calculations, portfolio simulations, and charts on Fnancal are for illustrative and educational purposes only. They do not constitute financial, investment, or tax advice. Always consult a qualified professional before making real-world financial investments.
TermsOfService.section3Text: We attempt to display accurate pricing and return data, but since it is gathered from public feeds, we do not warrant the timeliness, completeness, or absolute accuracy of any financial information. Sourced data is presented 'as-is'.
TermsOfService.section4Text: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential. You agree to use the site in compliance with applicable local and international laws.
TermsOfService.section5Text: In no event shall Fnancal or its developers be liable for any financial losses, damages, or errors resulting from the use or inability to use this platform.
